svg.text: BasicModel Architecture: MM_5M_bivector (bivectorOutput on C and S tiers)
Reverse pipeline: OutputSpace.reverse → SymbolicSpace.reverse (SVD pinv lift) → ConceptualSpace.reverse → PerceptualSpace.reverse → InputSpace.reverse
per stage (t ≥ 1): C_in includes prev S event
each stage runs body chart over stm.snapshot()
partition: order 0 in [0, D/2); order 1 in [D/2, 3D/4); ...
per-prototype [a_P, a_N] ∈ [0, 1]^2 at C and S tiers
De Morgan via pole-swap: ¬[a_P, a_N] = [a_N, a_P]
POS tags ride codebook category_ids; chart dispatches via host_layer(tier, rule).
S-tier ops: conjunction, disjunction, isEqual, isaPart (composite assertions).
C-tier ops: not, non, intersection, union, true, false, part, equal, swap.
1. Stem: byte stream → P → BPE chunk
chart compose @ C, codebook snap @ S
4. Loss: MSE at masked P positions
InterSentenceLayer — ARMA(p=5, q=2) over sentence reps (cross-sentence AR)
s_t = body's final S-tier root slot (sentence rep, dim = sentence_dim)
e_t = s_t − s_hat_t ; loss = MSE(s_hat_t, s_t)
buffers per row (non-persistent): _s_history [B, p, D] _e_history [B, q, D]
weight added to TheError under "discourse" category × armaScale (default 0.1)
at inference: discourse.predict_next() seeds ConceptualSpace._c_prior bias
Anti-capture mirror: ergodic exploration via Gradient Energy Sensor on α temperature
W_eff = α · W + (1 − α) · ε , ε ~ N(0, I)
noise at L, D, U keeps W exactly invertible
overlap penalty: drives codebook to antichain
α = 0 (pure exploration) → α = 1 (pure exploitation) drives annealing; zero-init W safe.
